Tap for a massage
Tap for a massage

Hiii! Selamat ulang tahun, Pelangiii~

I hope you're having a wonderful day. On your special day, I hope you're always blessed with happiness, good health, and success in everything you dream of. I hope you get to celebrate today with the people you love and create beautiful memories you'll never forget. I'll always be wishing the very best for you. Oh, and you know what? You're really amazing. You've made it this far. Even though it seems like there have been so many things that made you sad, tired, or angry along the way, you still got through them. I'm proud of you!

Please keep going and keep holding on until the very end for yourself, okay?

And remember, you are always loved. Even when it feels like the world isn't on your side, there will always be people who care about you. Everyone Adores You (At Least I Do).
